CONTENT.Career: Şen is a youth product of the Turkish clubs Galatasaray, Bursaspor and Yeşil Bursa. On 4 August 2020, he signed his first professional contract with Bursaspor and was promoted to their senior team in the TFF First League. On 26 January 2022, he transferred to the Süper Lig club Trabzonspor on a contract until the summer of 2026. On 3 February 2023, he joined İstanbulspor on loan for the second half of the 2022–23 season. After 7 appearances and 1 goal with İstanbulspor, he returned to Trabzonspor for the following 2023–24 season.
CONTENT.External links: Kerem Şen at SoccerwayKerem Şen at the Turkish Football Federation
CONTENT.International career: In September 2019, Şen was called up to a training camp for the Turkey U19s.

SUMMARY: Kerem Şen (born 14 June 2002) is a Turkish professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Trabzonspor.
